overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from open streets with large digital billboards, through a dark underpass, and back into open areas with heavy neon signage and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with towering digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red-paved sidewalk surrounded by towering digital advertisements and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long coat with cybernetic implants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in blue jacket walking past on the right side

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright red and white digital advertisements and neon strips
large blue and green holographic display with Japanese characters on building facade
wide pedestrian walkway with distinctive red tiles reflecting neon lights
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street
large tree with green foliage on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide red-paved sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Towering digital billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene with neon colors. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and a metal railing separates the walkway from the street where occasional vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway or monorail structure

events.description: enters dark covered area beneath large concrete overpass structure
ambient light drops significantly as moving deeper under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with concrete walls and ceiling overhead, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red backpack and red pants walking ahead on the left

entered.detail: massive dark concrete structure overhead blocking the sky and ambient light
thick cylindrical support column for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The neon glow from the previous street fades into shadow, with only distant lights visible ahead. The environment feels enclosed and industrial, with thick support pillars lining the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with graffiti-covered walls and steam vents

events.description: exits the underpass back into open street with visible neon signage ahead
passing steam vents releasing white vapor onto the sidewalk from grates

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall, approaching a neon-lit intersection with steam rising from vents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants and dark jacket walking ahead near the graffiti wall

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful cyberpunk-style graffiti and street art
ground vents releasing streams of white steam across the walkway
large glowing pink neon sculpture visible in the distance at the intersection
short black and yellow striped posts replacing the metal railing along the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the character walks along a street bordered by a vibrant graffiti-covered wall on the right. Steam rises from floor vents, creating atmospheric effects. The path is lined with black and yellow bollards, and a bright pink neon sculpture becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and heavy neon signage

events.description: approaching and entering large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk
crossing the wide street at the crosswalk while vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk, surrounded by towering neon billboards and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection from left to right
group of pedestrians waiting at the opposite side of the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with white striped markings on the asphalt
elevated walkway structure spanning across the intersection above the street
tall building covered in bright neon signs and digital displays at the intersection
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs indicating 40 speed limit

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide, busy intersection filled with neon light from surrounding buildings. Crossing the street at the crosswalk, the scene opens up to reveal an overhead pedestrian bridge and heavy traffic moving through the intersection. The density of pedestrians increases as the character approaches the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city that shifts from open, vibrant streets into a dark industrial underpass before emerging into a dense urban intersection. It begins on a wide red-paved sidewalk illuminated by towering holographic advertisements and digital billboards, moving past sparse pedestrians and a metal railing. As the character advances, the neon glow fades into shadow while the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass lined with thick support pillars. The scene then opens back into the light, passing a graffiti-covered wall and rising steam from floor vents before turning toward a bright pink neon sculpture in the distance. Finally, the path expands into a busy intersection filled with heavy traffic and an overhead pedestrian bridge, where the density of people increases as the character crosses the street.
